title: Tel #8521
definition:
Tel-harsa or Tel-haresha = "mound of the deaf mute"

 1) a town of Babylon
    1a) probably located in the low country near the sea
nasbUsage:
Definition: Tel-harsa or Tel-haresha = "mound of the deaf mute"

 1) a town of Babylon
    1a) probably located in the low country near the sea

    NASB:  mound of a craftsman, a city in Bab.
